name: integration_i_got_400_signups_in_30_days_and_made_0
method: I got 400 signups in 30 days and made $0. Two months later, developers are finally paying. Here's what changed. I build developer tools. I know how developers think because I am one. That turned out t

phases.name: audit_deployed_apps
steps: scan DEPLOYMENT_URLS for all live apps
check each for payment integration status
flag apps with zero payment gates

phases.name: generate_paywalls
steps: create usage-limit logic per app type
generate upgrade CTA copy using content hook patterns
create Stripe payment link per app

phases.name: apply_and_track
steps: inject paywall code into flagged apps
update KPI dashboard with conversion funnel
